identity.mission: Create a 'Peace Within' app that feels like a digital sanctuary—grounded, organic, and deeply human. Reject generic 'tech' aesthetics for tactile, pottery-like warmth.
principles: Emotion First: Every screen is a breathing exercise
Content is King: Typography and negative space tell the story
Imperfection: Use grain, asymmetry, and soft shapes to feel handmade

app_context.name: Peace Within
app_context.target_audience: Seekers of mental wellness, spiritual grounding, and anxiety relief.

typography.rules: Avoid 'Inter'. Use Serif for all emotive headers (Affirmations, Quotes). Use Sans for UI (Settings, forms).

colors.usage: Backgrounds must be off-white (#F9F7F2) or Warm Sand. NEVER pure white (#FFFFFF) for main backgrounds, only for cards. Text is Soft Charcoal (#2D332A), never black.

layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for Dashboard. Soft, asymmetrical cards.
layout.safe_area: Always wrap main content in SafeAreaView. Use `flex-1 bg-background`.

buttons.primary: bg-primary rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-stone-100

inputs.base: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl p-4 text-earth-800 placeholder-earth-300 focus:border-primary focus:bg-white

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays (opacity 0.03) on backgrounds to feel like paper.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows. Avoid sharp drops. IOS: shadow-opacity-5. Android: elevation-2.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'Lucide React Native' with thin strokes (1.5px). Color: Primary or Earth-600.

motion.interactions: Cards 'breathe' (scale up slightly) on press. Lists fade in with stagger.

hero_backgrounds.desc: Ripples in wet sand - Perfect for Login/Welcome background
Sunlight in forest - Perfect for 'Morning Affirmation' background

mood_visuals.desc: Abstract orange/brown - Good for 'Energy' or 'Passion' mood
Aerial lake view - Good for 'Calm' or 'Sad' mood

silhouettes.desc: Silhouette by ocean - Profile or Meditation placeholder

react_native_specifics: CRITICAL: Use `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TouchableOpacity>`, `<Image>` from 'react-native'. DO NOT use `div`, `span`, `h1`.
For shadows on Android, add `elevation` class or style.
Avoid absolute positioning unless necessary for overlays.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44px (p-4 usually handles this).
clean_code: Keep screens in `app/` simple, move logic to hooks if complex.
accessibility: Text must meet contrast ratio (Sage Green on Off-White is good, but check lighter greens).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup NativeWind theme in `tailwind.config.js` with the provided color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create base UI components (`Typography`, `Button`, `Card`, `Input`) in `components/ui/` implementing the E1 design rules.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build Auth Screens (Login/Signup) using the 'abstract_sand' background and glassmorphism cards.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build Home Screen (Dashboard) with Bento Grid layout for 'Daily Affirmation', 'Mood Check-in', and 'Progress'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement Mood Check-in flow (BottomSheet or dedicated screen) with large, tappable mood indicators.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Integrate AI Chat interface using a clean, message-bubble UI (Green for User, Gray for AI).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Ensure all text is styled with the specific font families (Serif for headers, Sans for body).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds; use solid earth tones or subtle textures.
Use 24px-32px rounded corners for a soft, friendly feel.
Avoid default system blue. Use the defined Primary Green or Secondary Clay.
Animations: specific transitions (opacity, transform) only. No `transition-all`.
Test IDs: All interactables must have `data-testid` (or `testID` in RN).
